description_long: This is a resealable plastic bag of Tyler's Fully Cooked Chicken Nuggets, prominently featuring a red and green color scheme with a clear product image on the front. The front displays the Tyler's logo in a gold oval, along with bold text highlighting '100% All Natural Ingredients' and 'No Antibiotics Ever.' The bag is labeled as containing 2 lbs of chicken nuggets, with a serving suggestion image showing nuggets and a dipping sauce. The back of the bag contains detailed nutritional facts, ingredients, and preparation instructions in a beige panel. The sides of the bag are narrow and show a continuation of the front and back graphics, with the resealable strip visible at the top. The overall shape is a gusseted stand-up pouch, typical for frozen snack foods.
description: A resealable plastic bag of Tyler's Fully Cooked Chicken Nuggets, featuring bold branding and product imagery on the front, with nutritional and preparation information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Tyler's logo, product name, serving suggestion image, and key marketing claims.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag and a partial glimpse of the front and back graphics.
description_view_2: Back view with detailed nutritional facts, ingredients, preparation instructions, and a barcode.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim edge of the bag and partial front/back graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The Tyler's logo is visible on the front and back, consisting of a gold oval with 'Tyler's' in white text, located near the top center of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag shows images of chicken nuggets and a dipping sauce, with text indicating 'Chicken Nuggets' and 'Fully Cooked'.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the bag, along with preparation instructions.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The front of the bag features a green burst graphic stating 'No Antibiotics Ever' and a yellow label indicating '2 lbs!'.
